rankings.title: Why the “Pursuit of Happiness” Is a Bad Idea | The Happiness Lab Podcast
summary_bullets: Modern pursuit of happiness often backfires.
Founders meant virtue, not just pleasure.
Tocqueville observed American melancholy in abundance.
Science shows valuing happiness reduces it.
Better to pursue meaning and social good.
rankings.display_title: Why the “Pursuit of Happiness” Is a Bad Idea | The Happiness Lab Podcast

rankings.title: The Surprising Case for Oversharing | The Happiness Lab Podcast
summary_bullets: Oversharing builds trust and connection.
People underestimate benefits of revealing.
Undersharing (TLI) can harm relationships.
Disclosure dilemmas favor TMI over TLI.
Practice sharing to overcome cringe voice.
rankings.display_title: The Surprising Case for Oversharing | The Happiness Lab Podcast

rankings.title: What to Do When You Can't Stop Thinking About the Past | The Happiness Lab Podcast
summary_bullets: Regret is a common, painful emotion.
"No regrets" philosophy is misguided.
Regret can clarify values and guide future choices.
Action regrets can be undone; inaction regrets can be acted on.
Self-compassion and sharing regrets helps.
rankings.display_title: What to Do When You Can't Stop Thinking About the Past | The Happiness Lab Podcast

rankings.title: Emotional Regulation Tips From a Harvard Psychologist | The Happiness Lab
summary_bullets: Negative emotions are data, not directives.
Bottling or brooding emotions harms well-being.
Label emotions precisely to gain clarity.
“What the funk” asks emotion’s function.
Discomfort is price of meaningful life.
rankings.display_title: Emotional Regulation Tips From a Harvard Psychologist | The Happiness Lab

rankings.title: Is Gen Z Actually More Fragile Than Previous Generations? | The Happiness Lab Podcast
summary_bullets: Gen Z not more fragile than past generations.
Cognitive biases create illusion of moral decline.
1970s student struggles mirror today's.
Clinical mental health crises are separate track.
Adults misremember their own college hardships.
rankings.display_title: Is Gen Z Actually More Fragile Than Previous Generations? | The Happiness Lab Podcast

rankings.title: The Beliefs Holding You Back (and How to Change Them) ft. Shawn Achor | The Happiness Lab
summary_bullets: Beliefs are lenses shaping reality.
Seven core beliefs predict well-being.
Placebo effect shows belief power.
Home field advantage disappears without fans.
Change beliefs via language and actions.
rankings.display_title: The Beliefs Holding You Back (and How to Change Them) ft. Shawn Achor | The Happiness Lab

rankings.title: You Don't Need to Hate Your Body to Take Good Care Of It | The Happiness Lab Podcast
summary_bullets: Body shame hinders exercise enjoyment.
Yoga can be spiritual, not just fitness.
Self-compassion improves movement and happiness.
Photographing yourself reveals inner critic.
Accepting darkness allows self-acceptance.
rankings.display_title: You Don't Need to Hate Your Body to Take Good Care Of It | The Happiness Lab Podcast
